_description: Player-facing 'Who's Who' cheat sheet, shown in the web companion sidebar. Maintained by the Bookkeeper: add a character when the party meets or learns of them; update note/disposition as things change. PLAYER-VISIBLE — never put secrets in name/disposition/note. Entries with known_to_party=false are hidden by the server (use to pre-stage reveals). disposition: friend | enemy | unknown.

characters.name: Maera Thistle
characters.note: Keeper of the Waylight Inn. Worried about old Piven and the dark lantern on the hill.
